changelog:
THE IRON BUNKER V4.2 (THE HOLY GRAIL):
- [SECURITY] End-to-End Encryption (E2E): Direct Messages (Laser Links) are now secured with RSA-OAEP 2048-bit quantum-grade encryption natively via Web Crypto API. Your Private Key never leaves the browser.
- [SYSTEM] Dual-Ciphertext Routing: Payloads are encrypted twice (for the target and for the local archive), ensuring absolute zero-knowledge storage. Even server admins cannot read the SQLite database.
- [UI] Real-Time Decryption: Decryption happens blazingly fast on the client-side UI without any external dependencies.
